name: vercel-ai-mic-selector
title: Microphone Selector
author: Vercel
description: A searchable audio-input selector with permission and device-change handling.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added a guard and unavailable state for browsers without navigator.mediaDevices.
Changed text alignment to logical RTL-aware utilities.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added a guard and unavailable state for browsers without navigator.mediaDevices. Changed text alignment to logical RTL-aware utilities.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
